message:
fix(sandbox,webhook): Add Landlock PR_SET_NO_NEW_PRIVS prerequisite and TTL-aware replay detection

Sandbox (fcp-sandbox/linux.rs):
- Add PR_SET_NO_NEW_PRIVS prctl call before Landlock enforcement, required
  when the process lacks CAP_SYS_ADMIN. Without this, landlock_restrict_self
  silently fails or returns EPERM on unprivileged processes.
- Applied both in the pre-fork sandbox setup and in the standalone
  apply_landlock() function with proper error reporting via SandboxError

Webhook handler (fcp-webhook/handler.rs):
- Introduce SeenEventsState struct wrapping the events HashMap with a
  last_cleanup timestamp, replacing the raw HashMap
- Make replay detection TTL-aware: check_replay_protection and
  check_and_record now verify that seen events are still within the
  idempotency_ttl window before rejecting, allowing legitimate re-delivery
  of events whose TTL has expired
- Optimize cleanup_seen_events to run at most once per minute instead of
  on every request, avoiding O(N) traversal overhead under high throughput
- Minor test cleanup: simplify DLQ test event ID and remove redundant comment

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
